channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Delhi CM Launches Heat Relief Vans and New Heat Action Plan to Protect Citizens
item.description: On Wednesday, Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta inaugurated 13 Mobile Heat Relief Unit vans, one for each district, under the campaign titled 'Garmi Se Jung, Delhi Sarkar Ke Sang'. The initiative aims ...

item.title: DNA analysis identifies four sailors from Franklin expedition
item.description: Researchers have successfully identified four sailors from the ill-fated Franklin expedition, which set out in 1845 to chart the Northwest Passage and was lost to the Arctic ice. Using advanced DNA an...

item.title: Francis Libiran to craft ASEAN Summit outfits for Marcos couple using Filipino fabrics
item.description: Renowned Filipino fashion designer Francis Libiran has been commissioned to design the outfits of President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and First Lady Liza Araneta Marcos for the upcoming ASEAN Summit. Known...

item.title: Toddler hospitalised after inhaling cake decorating powder, prompting safety warning from parents
item.description: A Gold Coast family has issued a public warning after their 14-month-old son, Dustin, was left fighting for his life in intensive care following a baking accident at home. The incident occurred while ...

item.title: Knysna Woman Killed by Falling Tree Amid Severe Weather
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Knysna, Western Cape, on Wednesday when a 37-year-old woman, Lauren Fredericks, lost her life after a tree fell onto her vehicle. The accident happened on Main Street in ...

item.title: US Pentagon Partners with Leading AI Firms for Military Applications
item.description: The Pentagon has formalized agreements with major AI companies, including SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, Microsoft, Amazon Web Services, Oracle, and Reflection, to integrate advanced artificial intel...

item.title: Guide to Scottish Election 2026: Party Policies and Key Issues
item.description: The Scottish Parliament election is scheduled for 7 May 2026, with all 129 seats contested. This guide provides voters with a clear overview of where the main political parties stand on the issues dee...

item.title: Tamil Nadu 2026 Election Results and Oath Taking Ceremony Updates
item.description: The news article was intended to provide live updates on the Tamil Nadu 2026 election results, including details about the formation of the Vijay TVK government, the oath-taking ceremony of Vijay, the...

item.title: US-Iran conflict: looming deadline for ceasefire amid escalating tensions
item.description: Tensions between Iran and the United States are reaching a critical point as a deadline for a potential ceasefire draws near. Former US President Donald Trump has issued a stark warning, threatening m...

item.title: Three Crew Members Evacuated from Cruise Ship After Hantavirus Cases Confirmed
item.description: Three people with suspected hantavirus infection, including a British doctor, were evacuated from the Dutch-flagged MV Hondius cruise ship. The patients, aged 56, 41, and 65, were taken for treatment ...

item.title: Sixteen visitors contract cryptosporidiosis at Craigies Farm in Edinburgh
item.description: Sixteen individuals have fallen ill after visiting Craigies Farm in South Queensferry, Edinburgh, with cases traced to the parasitic infection cryptosporidiosis. NHS Lothian is investigating the outbr...

item.title: Widow of former footballer Joe Thompson pregnant following IVF planned before his death
item.description: The widow of former professional footballer Joe Thompson has announced she is expecting a baby boy following IVF treatment planned before his death from cancer. Thompson, who played for clubs includin...

item.title: Authorities Execute Search Warrant at Home Linked to Convicted Killer Paul Flores
item.description: Authorities in San Luis Obispo, California, served a search warrant at a home connected to Paul Flores, the man convicted of murdering 19-year-old college student Kristin Smart in 1996. Smart disappea...

item.title: Government Urges Inclusive Measures for Disabled Persons Amid Severe Weather
item.description: The Department of Women, Youth and Persons with Disabilities (DWYPD) has expressed serious concern over the safety and well-being of persons with disabilities as South Africa continues to face severe ...

item.title: PSG reach second straight Champions League final after draw with Bayern
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain don qualify for their second consecutive UEFA Champions League final after dem manage hold Bayern Munich to a 1-1 draw, thanks to early goal from Ousmane Dembele. That goal, wey co...

item.title: 6 Moments of Anne Curtis’ Charming Presence on “It’s Showtime”
item.description: Anne Curtis continues to brighten up the Philippine noontime show scene with her signature ‘sosyal’ charm on ABS-CBN’s “It’s Showtime.” From her witty banter to playful interactions with co-hosts and ...

item.title: Edward surprises Katherine with a prom date in Episode 36 of The Alibi
item.description: In Episode 36 of the popular ABS-CBN series 'The Alibi,' Edward surprises Katherine with an unexpected prom date, adding a heartwarming moment to the story. The scene highlights Edward’s thoughtful an...

item.title: Madira: Rediscovering India’s Unique Cocktails with Traditional Ingredients
item.description: A recent book, 'Madira: India’s Forgotten Spirits and Cocktail Revival' by Parag A Shastry, brings together 101 cocktail recipes that creatively use uniquely Indian ingredients like jalebi, jackfruit ...

item.title: US-Based Kenyan Woman Holds Intimate Courthouse Wedding with Partner Abroad
item.description: Faith Chepkemoi, a Kenyan woman living in the United States, recently celebrated a key life milestone after getting married in a simple but meaningful ceremony abroad. The wedding took place at the De...

item.title: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship trigger contact tracing for South African flight passengers
